findings.evidence: `rg -n "def toContinuousMap|theorem contMDiff|theorem isEmbedding"` shows the new projection at `SmoothEmbedding/AmbientIsotopy.lean:58`, while the base file already contains the underlying bundled map and general topological consequences at `SmoothEmbedding.lean:86-106`; the projection uses only `f.contMDiff.continuous`, not ambient isotopy.
findings.fix: Move `toContinuousMap`, `toContinuousMap_apply`, `coe_toContinuousMap`, `toContinuousMap_injective`, and `toContinuousMap_inj` to `TauCeti/Geometry/Manifold/SmoothEmbedding.lean`, near `toContMDiffMap_coe`/`contMDiff`; keep this file for the `AmbientIsotopic` relation and its API.
findings.issue: `SmoothEmbedding.toContinuousMap` and its simp/injectivity API are generic bundled-smooth-embedding infrastructure, but they are introduced only in the ambient-isotopy specialization file.

summary: The ambient-isotopy specialization is in the right bridge file with direct imports, but the generic continuous-map projection is misplaced there. Move that reusable `SmoothEmbedding` API into the base smooth-embedding file.
